item.name: Tales of Adventure: One Monk's Journey I
item.description:
A detailed record of one adventurer's path to becoming a realm-renowned monk─so detailed, in fact, that all who read it come to swear they experienced the events firsthand.

Use to instantly level monk to 60 and complete all job quests up through “Appetite for Destruction.” Cannot be used outside large settlements. Automatic logout will commence upon usage.
